analysis: The project is a static website focused on black holes with existing CSS, HTML, and JavaScript files. The current theme needs enhancement with cosmic visuals, animations, and interactive elements related to black holes. The CSS file requires completion of dark cosmic theme with animations, the HTML needs mobile-friendly navigation and complete content sections, and the JavaScript needs syntax fixes and full functionality implementation.

improvements.description: Complete the CSS file with dark cosmic theme including black hole animations, swirling effects, glowing elements, and Egyptian-themed color palette.
Add mobile-friendly navigation with hamburger icon and complete HTML content with interactive planets, animated slides, and black hole-related sections.
Fix syntax errors in showSlide function, complete JavaScript content with proper event listeners, and implement mobile menu toggle with smooth transitions.
Add Link imports from 'wouter' for navigation elements and useState hook to manage mobile menu state.
